title: Zeus Packet Scope (scope.yaml)
description: Machine-readable scope sidecar for a Zeus development packet. Lives at docs/operations/<packet>/scope.yaml. Read by the packet runtime (zpkt) and the pre-commit hook. Authoritative for the question 'is this file in scope for this packet?'

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support.

schema_version.description: Bumps when the schema breaks compat.

packet.description: Packet folder basename. Must match docs/operations/<packet>.

branch.description: Git branch the packet is developed on.

worktree.description: Absolute path of the worktree (informational; not enforced).

in_scope.description: Glob patterns of files this packet may modify. Matched against staged file paths via fnmatchcase semantics.

allow_companions.description: Glob patterns of registry/mesh-maintenance files that may be touched as side effects (manifest updates, README hits, AGENTS.md routing). Soft-warn does NOT fire for these.

out_of_scope.description: Glob patterns explicitly forbidden. Always trigger soft-warn even if they coincidentally match in_scope. Forbidden-wins.
